title: Crown Commercial Service annual report and accounts 2024 to 2025
body: "Crown Commercial Service (CCS) was established in 2014 as a trading fund and executive agency of the Cabinet Office. Its purpose is to deliver commercial benefits and savings for central government and the wider public sector in the procurement of common goods and services.  This document provides the CCS annual report and accounts for the financial year 1 April 2024 to 31 March 2025. "
